arts.ttl: Hugo Ekitiké on filling Omar Marmoush's boots at Eintracht Frankfurt, European ambitions and more
arts.sum: Ekitiké: "I think it’s partly because we had a very young group of players who needed some time to play together, to get to know each other, and to build something. Ekitiké: "I think the Champions League is at the back of our minds, but we’re not focusing on it too much right now because there are still a lot of league games to come.

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Man City face 'never before seen' situation in Wirtz battle
arts.sum: Bayern Munich would be willing to go into debt to secure the signing of Florian Wirtz, according to honorary president Uli Hoeness. Nevertheless, Wirtz continues to be the subject of rampant transfer speculation, with Arsenal, Man City and, chief among them, Bayern Munich perpetually linked with him.

arts.ttl: Saturday's Bundesliga predictions including Eintracht Frankfurt vs. Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Bundesliga fixtures, including Eintracht Frankfurt vs. Bayer Leverkusen.

arts.ttl: Man City 'handed Florian Wirtz setback' as Bayern Munich position becomes clear
arts.sum: Karl-Heinz Rummenigge confirms Bayern Munich's interest in signing Manchester City-linked Florian Wirtz from reigning Bundesliga champions Bayer Leverkusen.

arts.ttl: Papers: Bayern set to battle Man City for Leverkusen star Wirtz
arts.sum: The top stories and transfer rumours from Saturday's newspapers...

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich chief confirms they will try to sign Bayer Leverkusen star Florian Wirtz this summer - with Bundesliga giants set to battle Man City for 'the best player in Germany'
arts.sum: Bayern Munich chief Karl-Heinz Rummenigge has announced that his club will target the signing of Bayer Leverkusen's Florian Wirtz this summer.

arts.ttl: Eintracht Frankfurt eye Hoffenheim’s Anton Stach as potential Hugo Larsson replacement
arts.sum: Germany's main sporting tabloid reports that Eintracht Frankfurt are taking a close look at German youth international Anton Stach.

arts.ttl: “We will face top opponents” – Alonso ready for Eintracht Frankfurt clash
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen travel to Eintracht Frankfurt in the Bundesliga Topspiel on Saturday evening and Xabi Alonso is expecting a difficult game against the Hessen club, who are on course for…

arts.ttl: Eintracht Frankfurt vs Bayer Leverkusen preview: Visitors must win to keep title hopes alive
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen aim to keep their slim title hopes alive on Saturday evening, as they take on Eintracht Frankfurt.

arts.ttl: Alonso has no plans to rest players ahead of Bayern clash
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen coach Xabi Alonso says he has no plans to rotate his squad heavily against Eintracht Frankfurt with the midweek Champions League clash against Bayern Munich in mind.
